title: Render the per-model usage block on multiple status-line rows
action: Emit each model's cost/new/cached segment on its own row, put the billed total on a final row, and append the usage block below the existing general status row.

truths: General session status remains on the first row
Each model has one usage row
Multiple models get a final billed-total row
ANSI formatting resets correctly across rows
prohibitions: Do not change usage arithmetic, pricing, or deduplication

trace.outcome: The status line now renders general session data first, then one usage row per model and a final billed-total row.
trace.verify_output: general status row; fable row; sonnet row; opus row; total billed row; node --check PASS; bash -n PASS; cache replay PASS
